name: second-brain-capture
description: Captures redacted Claude Code session activity and pushes one curated note per session into a Cortex knowledge base. Redaction is proxied through Cortex (OAuth) to a private AxonFlow agent, so capture works off-VPN; only redacted notes reach Cortex. Includes /save to push curated notes (summaries, threads, transcripts) into the team KB on demand.
